targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias("createdAt", '1h'), action AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM "AuditLog" WHERE $__timeFilter("createdAt") GROUP BY 1, action ORDER BY 1
SELECT count(*) AS failures FROM "AuditLog" WHERE status = 'failure' AND $__timeFilter("createdAt")
SELECT action, count(*) AS count FROM "AuditLog" WHERE $__timeFilter("createdAt") GROUP BY action ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT "userId", count(*) AS count FROM "AuditLog" WHERE $__timeFilter("createdAt") GROUP BY "userId" ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Audit records — search by actor / request ID (filters above)

targets.rawSql: SELECT "createdAt", "userId" AS actor, action, resource, status, "requestId", ip FROM "AuditLog" WHERE $__timeFilter("createdAt") AND (''='${actor}' OR "userId" = '${actor}') AND (''='${reqid}' OR "requestId" = '${reqid}') ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 200
